# ctyun_postgresql_association_eip (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `eip` (String) 弹性ip
- `eip_id` (String) 弹性id
- `inst_id` (String) 实例id

### Optional

- `project_id` (String) 项目id
- `region_id` (String) 资源池Id

### Read-Only

- `eip_status` (Number) 弹性ip状态 0->unbind，1->bind,2->binding
